channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Light no 1 on 24/7 Longville Road, 18th March
item.description:
Light no 1 on 24/7 Longville Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longville Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Traffic cone dumped on The Avenue, 18th March
item.description:
Traffic cone x1 abandoned on grass verge at the end of The Avenue at junction with Southend Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling collection missed 3 weeks, 18th March
item.description:
Hello, Recycling collection for our block of flats has not been done for 3 weeks now. Shippenham Court, 179D Dartmouth Road SE26 4RN
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Way, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
Rubbish in car park area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Greater London

item.title: Near Queen road Peckham on asylum Road. On the grass section., 18th March
item.description:
Dead White Cat
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Asylum Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large / dangerous pothole in non-segregated cycleway, 18th March
item.description:
There is a large pothole in the non-segregated cycleway as Eastcheap turns left into King William Street (London Bridge approach). the hole could unseat a cyclist, or diversionary action could put the cyclist into motor traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, King William Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple frames, 18th March
item.description:
Multiple frames with smashed glass in grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silverdale Drive, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several instances of runny dog poo on pavement, 18th March
item.description:
Dog poo is a recurrent problem along the whole street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Ferris Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kitchen cabinet waste and a car seat, 18th March
item.description:
It has been in the pavement for several weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Ferris Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very sharp and deep pothole on norfolk crescent, 18th March
item.description:
The pothole is very sharp and getting worse quickly outside 84 norfolk crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Norfolk Crescent, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pram, scooter and Litter all over the grass, 18th March
item.description:
Someone's has had fun over night, dumping a scooter, pram and general waste all over the grass outside the bungalows.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rancliffe Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Wood/timber dumped on the corner of Clarence Mews and Clarence Place. The mattress in the photograph is no longer there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and Waste, 18th March
item.description:
Litter on Hamlet Road and Maberley Crescent. Please can this be cleared. Litter being caused from bins.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on walkway up to Andrews Walk and on number 7’s wall, 18th March
item.description:
Graffiti here since January

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105-111, Bethwin Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water coming from hole in road and footpath bricks dropping., 18th March
item.description:
The photo shows the first drop of footpath bricks. It was taken a few weeks ago. Since I have noticed further bricks dropping in other areas and now water coming from a small hole at the edge of the road/pavement. The water seems to be dirty. Not clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash, 18th March
item.description:
This trash has been sitting here for over two weeks and is growing. Please clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ronalds Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash - constant and never cleaned, 18th March
item.description:
The walkway to and from the bridge connecting Bromley North to Sundridge Park is absolutely filthy in two years living in BN the area has never been cleaned. We prefer to walk around than walk through this mess. It is full of new and old trash and debris and gets worse. Not to mention overlooking the bridge looks like a landfill due to what appears to be months of fly tipping. Please clean this area immediately. As this does not represent this neighborhood or the council tax we pay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ronalds Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Bikes cŵausing obstruction in road and residents bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowbank, Chalk Farm, Greater London
